name: @originintelligence/pi-figma
description_en: pi extension: token-efficient Figma file access via REST. Never returns raw Figma JSON — every tool transforms to a compact, LLM-friendly shape and caches by file version.
description_zh: pi 扩展：通过 REST 进行高效的 Figma 文件访问。从不返回原始 Figma JSON — 每个工具都转换为紧凑的、LLM 友好的形状，并按文件版本缓存。
